highlights.text: Jaipur (2N) → Pushkar (1N) → Jodhpur (2N) → Udaipur (1N) comfort circuit
Senior-friendly pacing with Innova Crysta MUV and step-stool boarding
Elevator access at Mehrangarh Fort and golf-cart at City Palace
CP plan with relaxed buffet breakfasts

itinerary.title: Premium Heritage Rajasthan Senior Circuit
itinerary.tagline: Jaipur • Pushkar • Jodhpur • Udaipur — 06 Nights / 07 Days Comfort Circuit
itinerary.overview: Welcome to a timeless journey crafted with exceptional care, patience, and warmth. This exclusive Rajasthan Family Tour and senior-focused circuit balances gentle pacing with royal grandeur, seamlessly connecting majestic forts, peaceful lakes, and sacred landscapes. Features a dedicated smooth-riding luxury Innova Crysta with professional chauffeur, handpicked hotels with elevator access and minimal walking, and curated experiences designed for absolute comfort. Route: Jaipur → Pushkar → Jodhpur → Udaipur. Best season: October to March.
itinerary.seo_title: RJ-009 | Premium Heritage Rajasthan Senior Circuit | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Comfort-focused 06 Nights / 07 Days Rajasthan tour (RJ-009) for senior citizens: Jaipur, Pushkar, Jodhpur, Udaipur with accessible fort visits and private Lake Pichola cruise.

days.title: Arrival in Jaipur | Royal Greetings & Relaxed Evening
days.description: Warm traditional greeting, comfortable transfer to premium hotel, and gentle drive past illuminated Albert Hall Museum with welcome dinner.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Albert Hall illuminated drive, local heritage walks
Optional Activities: Visit to the local handicraft emporium
Evening Experience: Relaxed sit-down traditional dinner
Overnight Stay: Jaipur (Handpicked Premium Hotel)

days.title: Jaipur Royal Exploration | Comfortable Fort Ascent
days.description: Amer Fort with vehicle access to main courtyard, Hawa Mahal photo stop, and accessible golf-cart tour of City Palace.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Amer Fort Courtyard, Hawa Mahal Photo Stop, City Palace via Golf-Cart
Optional Activities: Private block-printing demonstration
Evening Experience: Leisurely stroll through the accessible gardens of Kanak Vrindavan
Overnight Stay: Jaipur

days.title: Jaipur to Pushkar | Holy Lake & Brahma Temple
days.description: Short drive to Pushkar. Gentle walk to Pushkar Lake ghats and Brahma Temple. Evening prayer ceremonies by the lake.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Brahma Temple, Pushkar Holy Lake Ghats, Rose Gardens
Optional Activities: Relaxing traditional foot massage at the resort spa
Evening Experience: Spiritually uplifting sunset chants by the lake
Overnight Stay: Pushkar (Premium Heritage Resort)

days.title: Pushkar to Jodhpur | Sunset Fort Views
days.description: Leisurely drive to Jodhpur with comfort stops. Evening terrace views of illuminated Mehrangarh Fort.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Highway landscape viewing, palace grounds exploration
Optional Activities: Tea tasting featuring classic Marwari blends
Evening Experience: Private family dinner under the stars
Overnight Stay: Jodhpur (Premium Palace Hotel)

days.title: Jodhpur Sightseeing | Mehrangarh with Elevator Access
days.description: Mehrangarh Fort with exclusive lift access, Jaswant Thada gardens, and Umaid Bhawan vintage car museum.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Mehrangarh Fort with Elevator, Jaswant Thada Gardens, Umaid Bhawan Car Collection
Optional Activities: Soft handicraft shopping at Sadar bazaar with private pickup
Evening Experience: Fine-dining dinner featuring signature Rajasthani delicacies
Overnight Stay: Jodhpur

days.title: Jodhpur to Udaipur | Ranakpur & Sunset Lakeside Cruise
days.description: En-route Ranakpur Jain Temple. Private boat cruise on Lake Pichola at sunset with Jag Mandir views.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Ranakpur Temple, Lake Pichola Private Cruise, Jag Mandir Views
Optional Activities: Photography session during sunset
Evening Experience: Lakeside fine-dining dinner organized by your concierge
Overnight Stay: Udaipur (Premium Lakeside Resort)

days.title: Udaipur Sightseeing & Departure | Royal Gardens & Farewell
days.description: Visit Saheliyon-ki-Bari gardens, final lunch, and transfer to Udaipur Airport.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Saheliyon-ki-Bari, local arts emporium
Meals Included: Premium Buffet Breakfast

inclusions.text: Comfort-driven premium hotel stays with accessible rooms
Daily multi-cuisine buffet breakfasts with dietary preferences
Dedicated executive chauffeur-driven Innova Crysta vehicle
Exclusive elevator/lift access passes at Mehrangarh Fort
Complimentary smooth private boat cruise on Lake Pichola
All road taxes, parking, toll fees, and driver allowances
Monument entry fees, camera costs, and local guide gratuities
Personal laundry, telephone bills, or mini-bar usage
Optional activities such as village safaris or special spa sessions
Surcharges for peak festival dates or gala dinners
